name: Red Lobster Caesar Dressing W/Variations
recipeIngredient: Bottled Hidden Valley Ranch dressing (1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl with a wire whisk until perfectly smooth and creamy.
2. For Greek Dressing, add 1/4 teaspoon cumin powder and whisk well.
3. For Creamy Caesar, add 1 tablespoon anchovy paste or 1 tablespoon soy sauce and 2 tablespoons sour cream.
4. Refrigerate the dressing tightly covered to use within 30 days. Do not freeze.
